capabilities.name: MemPalace
capabilities.description: Workspace-level long-term memory and retrieval service for Codex Workspace.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Use the workspace-memory wrappers for save, export, wake-up, and sync flows. MemPalace is a workspace service, not a normal repo dependency.
capabilities.uninstallPolicy: Remove the managed checkout and disposable cache only. Keep shared durable memory unless the operator removes it intentionally.
capabilities.notes: Keep runtime code in tools/, durable per-user state in shared/, and disposable runtime artifacts in cache/.

capabilities.name: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
capabilities.description: Optional local DESIGN.md catalog that repos can copy from without turning the upstream repo into a shared runtime dependency.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Copy only the specific DESIGN.md files a repo needs. Repos should document the copied file or the required ability explicitly instead of depending on the catalog silently.
capabilities.uninstallPolicy: Remove the managed repo checkout and the disposable DESIGN.md catalog cache. Do not rewrite copied DESIGN.md files that already live inside other repos.
capabilities.notes: Treat this as an optional installable ability rather than core workspace infrastructure.

capabilities.name: openai/skills
capabilities.description: Reviewed upstream skill catalog for selective installation and pattern study.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Install only the specific skills you need; do not vendor the entire upstream catalog into the workspace.
capabilities.uninstallPolicy: Remove the reviewed snapshot only. No tracked docs or copied repo-local skills should be modified.
capabilities.notes: Reference-only unless a later review promotes specific capabilities.

capabilities.name: openai/codex
capabilities.description: Reviewed upstream Codex CLI and .codex surface reference.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Use this as source material for official .codex conventions; do not treat it as a vendored workspace dependency.
capabilities.uninstallPolicy: Remove the reviewed snapshot only. Keep any tracked repo-local .codex surfaces.
capabilities.notes: Reference-only unless a later review promotes specific conventions.

capabilities.name: oh-my-codex
capabilities.description: Reviewed optional Codex workflow ideas from an external upstream.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Treat it as optional source material or a dedicated fork outside the workspace dependency tree.
capabilities.notes: Reference-only until there is a concrete repo-level or workspace-level adoption case.

capabilities.name: oh-my-openagent
capabilities.description: Reviewed OpenCode-specific reference patterns with a license and runtime model that are not suitable as a default workspace dependency.
capabilities.repoUsageNotes: Keep it as reviewed reference material unless the OpenCode-specific runtime and license are an intentional fit.
